speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Discussing the future
questions: What are your plans after you finish this course?
Are you certain about your future career?
Do you think your plans will change?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I am going to continue studying English after this course. I'm not completely certain about my career yet, but I think it will become clearer over time.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Comparing places
questions: Is your home bigger or smaller than your friend's home?
Is your city noisier than the countryside?
Which is more modern, your house or your grandparents' house?
speaking.sampleAnswer: My home is a little smaller than my friend's home. Yes, my city is noisier than the countryside. My house is more modern than my grandparents' house.
